must_do: Edit only /root/agent-community/app/services/group_session.py unless a strictly necessary import adjustment in that same file is required.

task.goal: Sync the live backend group_session.py logic so the authoritative news-test session consumes group_session_seed from the already active protocol baseline, then verify the session endpoint reflects the seeded baseline.
